headline: Diamondback Energy Hiking Shale Output. Oil Stocks Skid On Earnings.

headline: Diamondback Energy (FANG) Is Up 8.8% After Raising 2026 Output Guidance And Dividend - What's Changed
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Diamondback Energy reported US$4,240 million in revenue, oil and gas production growth across all streams, a US$1.40 billion impairment charge on oil and natural gas properties, and net income of US$25 million, while also raising its base cash dividend by 5% to US$1.10 per share. Despite the very large impairment dragging down earnings, management increased 2026 production guidance and the dividend, signaling confidence in the company’s cash generation capacity...
